name: workspace-hygiene
goal: Add workspace-hygiene feature with core HygieneService and CLI commands for scanning and cleaning up workspace entropy (stale meetings, uncompacted memory, resolved commitments, activity log bloat).

userStories.title: Extract Jaccard similarity utilities to shared module
userStories.description: Move core Jaccard set-intersection computation to packages/core/src/utils/similarity.ts. Leave each caller's normalization in place. Preserve public API re-exports in services/index.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: jaccardSimilarity(a: string[], b: string[]): number exported from utils/similarity.ts
normalizeForJaccard(text: string): string exported from utils/similarity.ts
services/index.ts re-exports both from ../utils/similarity.js
meeting-extraction.ts imports from utils instead of defining locally
commitments.ts imports jaccardSimilarity from utils but keeps own normalize()
area-parser.ts imports jaccardSimilarity from utils but keeps own tokenizeWithStopWords()
Unit tests for edge cases: empty, identical, disjoint, partial overlap
All existing tests pass: npm run typecheck && npm test

userStories.title: Add purgeResolved() to CommitmentsService
userStories.description: Add public method to explicitly purge resolved commitments older than configurable threshold. Wraps existing shouldPrune() logic.
acceptanceCriteria: purgeResolved(olderThanDays?: number): Promise<{ purged: number }> method added
Default threshold is PRUNE_DAYS (30)
Does not touch open/active commitments
Handles missing/empty commitments.json gracefully
Tests: no resolved → 0, mix → only resolved removed, custom threshold, empty file
npm run typecheck && npm test pass

userStories.title: Add compactLearnings() to AreaMemoryService
userStories.description: Add method to compact old learnings entries. IMPORTANT: learnings.md uses bullet-list format (- YYYY-MM-DD: text), NOT heading sections. Requires dedicated parser — cannot reuse parseMemorySections().
acceptanceCriteria: compactLearnings(workspacePaths, options?) method added with olderThanDays option (default 90)
Parses bullet-list format: - YYYY-MM-DD: text (from: source)
Old entries archived to .arete/memory/archive/learnings-YYYY-MM-DD.md
Recent entries remain in learnings.md
CompactResult type returned with archived/kept/archivePath
Does NOT use parseMemorySections() (heading-based parser)
Entries without parseable dates are preserved (conservative)
compactDecisions() still works unchanged
Tests: all recent → 0 archived, mix → correct split, empty file, no-date entries
npm run typecheck && npm test pass

userStories.title: Define hygiene types in core models
userStories.description: Add TypeScript type definitions for HygieneItem, HygieneReport, HygieneScanOptions, etc. to packages/core/src/models/hygiene.ts and barrel-export.
acceptanceCriteria: All types defined: HygieneTier, HygieneCategory, HygieneActionType, HygieneItem, HygieneReport, ApprovedAction, HygieneResult, HygieneScanOptions
Exported from models/hygiene.ts and re-exported from models/index.ts
Available from @arete/core package exports
No any types
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement HygieneService with scan and apply
userStories.description: Create core HygieneService that scans for workspace entropy and applies approved cleanup actions by delegating to owning services. Wire into createServices() factory.
acceptanceCriteria: HygieneService class with scan() and apply() methods
scan() is pure read — no filesystem mutations
scan() detects: stale meetings (tier 1), resolved commitments (tier 1), old memory entries (tier 2), activity log bloat (tier 2), duplicate memory (tier 3)
apply() validates scannedAt freshness (<1hr)
apply() delegates: meetings via StorageAdapter, commitments via CommitmentsService.purgeResolved(), memory via AreaMemoryService compact methods
apply() tracks per-action success/failure without stopping on individual failure
Meeting archival moves to resources/meetings/archive/YYYY-MM/ with archived_at frontmatter
Wired into createServices() as hygiene: HygieneService
AreteServices type updated, factory test updated with 'hygiene' key
Exported from @arete/core
Unit tests: empty scan, stale meetings, old memory, duplicates, apply delegation, stale rejection, partial failure
npm run typecheck && npm test pass

userStories.title: CLI arete hygiene scan and apply commands
userStories.description: Add arete hygiene scan and arete hygiene apply commands as thin shell over HygieneService. Follow commitments.ts as template.
acceptanceCriteria: registerHygieneCommand exported and registered in index.ts
scan: --tier, --category, --area, --json options
scan: human output uses header/section/listItem/info formatters
scan --json returns HygieneReport
apply: --tier, --yes, --dry-run, --skip-qmd, --json options
apply without --yes: interactive checkbox with tier 1 pre-checked
apply --yes: auto-approves all
apply --json: auto-approves, never blocks stdin
apply --dry-run: shows actions without executing
apply calls refreshQmdIndex after success (unless --skip-qmd)
Workspace detection with error handling for both JSON and human output
Tests: clean scan, fixtures scan, apply --yes, dry-run, outside workspace error
npm run typecheck && npm test pass
